node.statement: STEP: Start from Eq.(6): E_U Tr(ρ_{B/RB}^2) = ⟨⟨v_0|E_U[(U⊗U*)^{⊗2}]|v_{B/RB}⟩⟩ ⊗ |0,0⟩^{⊗2}. For global Haar U, apply Eq.(3) to get two sums over S_2. In large-N limit, only σ=π=e and σ=π=s contribute. Boundary vector: ⟨⟨v_0| = ⟨⟨s|N^{⊗2} (noise at output). Bottom: |v_B⟩⟩ = d^{-2k}|e⟩⟩ for B-purity, |v_{RB}⟩⟩ = d^{-2k}|s⟩⟩ for RB-purity.
